response.justification: Bogdan demonstrates strong software engineering skills across multiple languages and domains, with notable experience in geospatial systems (GISCollective) and low-latency applications (Optilyz, Dunnhumby). However, his expertise in C++/Rust and distributed systems is limited, and his geospatial routing experience is primarily project-based rather than production-scale. His background leans toward web/mobile development, which may not fully align with the routing pipeline and tiling requirements.
strengths: Extensive experience with geospatial data platforms (GISCollective) and real-time systems
Strong software craftsmanship practices (TDD, CI/CD, pair programming)
Proven ability to build scalable systems (Dunnhumby's low-latency services)
concerns: Limited direct experience with C++/Rust (primary technologies for the role)
No explicit mention of routing/tiling or navigation systems at production scale
Most recent work focuses on AI-agent infrastructure and developer tooling, not routing pipelines
